name: Clarion
description: Voice co-pilot that bridges your live tab to the Clarion brain over a local relay.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ws://127.0.0.1:8771 ws://localhost:8771 http://127.0.0.1:8772 wss: https:; media-src 'self' blob:

start-clarion.description: Attach Clarion to the active tab and bridge it to the local relay
